Annotate a list of DOIs using CrossRef

Source: R/annotation.R
annotate_doi_list_cross_ref.Rd

Queries the CrossRef /works API for each DOI and returns a tidy data frame of bibliographic metadata. Column names are aligned with those returned by annotate_doi_list_europmc to allow easy coalesce-based merging.

Usage

annotate_doi_list_cross_ref(doi_list, batch_size = 50L)

Arguments

doi_list

Character vector of DOIs.

batch_size

Integer. Number of DOIs per cr_works request (default 50).

Value

A data frame with columns doi, title, authorString, journalTitle, pubYear, pubType, publisher, issn, volume, issue, page, and citedByCount.

Examples

# \donttest{
annotate_doi_list_cross_ref(c("10.1038/nature16961"))
# }
